title: Indian Steel Production Sets Another Record
section_path: Indian Steel Production Sets Another Record
section_path_text: Indian Steel Production Sets Another Record
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, global steel production totaled approximately 144.5 million tons in December. This is down month-on-month by 2.3 million tons (-2%) but is 8.8 million tons (7%) more than was reported last year for December 2023's production. Steel production outside of China totaled approximately 68.5 million tons.
